privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the task operates on a synthetically generated Chrome profile via setup_task.sh. The expected bookmark folders ('Avalanche & Weather', 'Medical Protocols', 'Operations', 'Off-Duty Media'), startup URLs ('avalanche.org', 'mesowest.utah.edu', 'weather.gov'), and download directory ('Incident_Reports') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the generated specification document /home/ga/Desktop/dispatch_terminal_spec.txt and the verifier.py evaluation logic.
